title: Eva Rebuild Sheet Music
wikitext:
[]: Eva: Rebuild Sheet Music             Quote Post by aboose » Thu Aug 16, 2012 9:57 pm I was scouring the forum for any info on this but came up empty. Sorry if it's asked before. I'm curious as to if there is any documented sheet music for piano (or other instruments) for the Rebuild music. Particularly, in my case, I'm interested in "Instabilite: Piano Solo" from the Eva 2.0 soundtrack. But any others are welcome too. Thank you.

[]:             Quote Post by alexprevity » Wed Dec 26, 2012 4:29 am Wow! I'm glad I found this. I actually just finished making the sheet music (and MIDI too) for the piano version of Instabilité (2EM17_KK_A08). Here are the links to download the files! My apologies if the sheet music arrangement is messy; I promise the MIDI is spot on. https://dl.dropbox.com/u/24684265/Instabilite.pdf https://dl.dropbox.com/u/24684265/Instabilite.mid I may be transcribing Tranquillité somewhere down the road too, if you'd like that!

[]:             Quote Post by TomasJC » Thu Dec 27, 2012 3:40 pm Hey, that's neat-o! Definitely going to give this piece a try. I wish there were more people out there willing to try the NME score.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Dec 27, 2012 6:41 pm alexprevity wrote: I may be transcribing Tranquillité somewhere down the road too, if you'd like that!

[]:             Quote Post by Syrax » Fri Apr 19, 2013 8:26 pm I know absolutely nothing about music but I made this MIDI of Theme Q (Guitare) using GP5. It's simple but I think it works, what do you guys think? I hear that some notes are off but I just couldn't get them right, maybe someone knowledgeable can fix it. I also skipped the sweeping strum ending...

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Apr 19, 2013 9:25 pm We have a full orchestral set of drums at my campus. Perhaps I'll see if I can get the music for those parts down.

[]: Re:             Quote Post by Jibe » Tue Nov 13, 2018 10:21 am alexprevity wrote: Wow! I'm glad I found this. I actually just finished making the sheet music (and MIDI too) for the piano version of Instabilité (2EM17_KK_A08). Here are the links to download the files! My apologies if the sheet music arrangement is messy; I promise the MIDI is spot on. https://dl.dropbox.com/u/24684265/Instabilite.pdf https://dl.dropbox.com/u/24684265/Instabilite.mid I may be transcribing Tranquillité somewhere down the road too, if you'd like that!

[]: Re: Eva: Rebuild Sheet Music             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Nov 13, 2018 10:31 am You're asking someone who hasn't been on the forum for five years. Try asking Google instead and you'll get: https://sheet.host/sheet/sysvrW
